title: Composed STS
description: A single Symbolic Transition System that is the conjunction (composition) of all per-scenario partial STSs. Produced by the pickles-translator as '<timestamp>_<basename>_composed.json'. The composition merges locations via choice and sequential composition, and deduplicates identical guards, gates, and assignments across scenarios.

variableDefinition.title: Variable Definition
variableDefinition.description: Type annotation and finite domain for a single STS variable.

type.description: Data type of the variable. 'decimal' maps to floating-point numbers.

range.description: Finite ordered list of allowed values. Element JSON type must be consistent with 'type': string→string, integer/decimal→number, boolean→boolean.

gate.title: Gate
gate.description: An input or output gate with a natural-language label and a list of parameters it communicates.

text.description: Natural-language label extracted from the Gherkin 'When' (input) or 'Then' (output) step.

shortname.description: Optional short identifier for the gate, for display purposes.

parameters.description: Ordered list of parameter IDs communicated by this gate. Each ID must be a key in the composed STS 'parameters' map. May be empty.

guardExpr.title: Guard Expression
guardExpr.description: A boolean/arithmetic expression node: a variable reference or literal leaf, or a nested operator node.

oneOf.description: Set literal, used as the rhs of 'in' / 'not in'.

assignment.title: Assignment
assignment.description: A single variable update executed atomically when a switch fires.

target.description: Target variable ID. Must be a base-name key from the composed STS 'locationVariables' map (non-expanded).

expression.description: Right-hand side expression. Typically the corresponding parameter ID, but may be a computed expression.

switch.title: Switch
switch.description: A labelled transition between two locations. Fires when the gate is triggered and the guard holds; executes the assignments on firing.

init_loc.description: Source location ID. Must appear in the composed STS 'locations' array.

gate.description: ID of the triggering gate. Must be a key in the composed STS 'inputGates' or 'outputGates' map.

guard.description: ID of the single guard from the composed STS 'guards' map that must hold for this switch to fire.

assignments.description: Ordered list of assignment IDs from the composed STS 'assignments' map, executed when the switch fires. May be empty.

end_loc.description: Target location ID. Must appear in the composed STS 'locations' array.

composedSts.title: Composed STS
composedSts.description: The result of composing all partial STSs into a single system.

id.description: Fixed identifier for the composed STS. Always 'sts_composed'.

description.description: Human-readable label listing all composed scenario IDs (e.g. 'Composition of scenarios sts_001, sts_002, sts_003, sts_004').

initial_location.description: The single shared initial location for the composed STS. Always 'L0_comp'.

gate_id_type.description: JSON type used for gate IDs.

location_id_type.description: JSON type used for location IDs.

initialValuation.description: Optional initial value per location variable.

locationVariables.description: All state variables in the composed system, keyed by variable ID. Identical to the location variables from the partial STSs (they share the same domain). Array-of-struct variables are expanded: 'arrayName[i].attrName' is a separate entry.

parameters.description: Gate parameters: one per location variable, keyed by the variable ID suffixed with '_p'. Same type and range as the source variable.

attributes.description: Always empty: struct attribute types are inferable from the expanded 'locationVariables' keys (e.g. 'arr[0].attr').

locations.description: All location IDs in the composed STS. Includes: 'L0_comp' (shared initial); 'L<i>_<N>' locations inherited from each partial STS; and compound locations 'L<a>_<x>_L<b>_<y>' generated by sequential composition (where the end of scenario X connects to the start of scenario Y).

inputGates.description: Input gates after deduplication across all partial STSs. Identical gates (same text and parameters) are merged. IDs are reassigned sequentially: 'In1', 'In2', ... (no underscore suffix, unlike partial STSs).

outputGates.description: Output gates after deduplication across all partial STSs. Identical gates are merged. IDs: 'Out1', 'Out2', ...

guards.description: Named guard expression trees after deduplication. Identical expressions from different partial STSs are merged into a single entry. IDs are reassigned sequentially: 'G1', 'G2', ...

assignments.description: Named variable assignments after deduplication. Identical (target, expression) pairs from different partial STSs are merged into a single entry. IDs are reassigned sequentially: 'A1', 'A2', ...

switches.description: All transitions from all composed partial STSs, with IDs reassigned to a single continuous sequence: 'r_1', 'r_2', ... Switches from partial STSs have their gate, guard, and assignment references remapped to the deduplicated composed IDs.
